name: Blueberry French Toast
recipeIngredient: 12 slice day-old white bread; crusts removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut bread into 1-inch cubes; place half in a greased 13x9x2 inch baking dish.
2. Cut cream cheese into 1-inch cubes; place over the bread.
3. Top with blueberries and remaining bread.
4. In a large bowl, beat eggs. Add milk and syrup; mix well.
5. Pour mixture over the bread combination.
6. Cover and chill for 8 hours or overnight.
7. Remove from refrigerator 30 minutes before baking.
8. Cover and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
9. Uncover and bake for 25-30 minutes more, or until golden brown and the center is set.
10. In a saucepan, combine sugar and cornstarch; add water. Bring to a boil over medium heat; boil for 3 minutes, stirring constantly.
11. Stir in blueberries; reduce heat.
12. Simmer for 8-10 minutes, or until berries have burst.
13. Stir in butter until melted.
14. Serve sauce over French toast.
